testSuite.name: 137841 : Addition of advance search values to Person search

workItemFields.Microsoft.VSTS.TCM.Steps: <steps id="0" last="4"><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true"><DIV><DIV><P>open the person search popup and click on the "additional options" arrow in the bottom of the popup</P></DIV></DIV></parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true"><DIV><P>you will see the "additional options" section with the options- ID, Vehicle, Network</P></DIV></parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="3" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true"><DIV><DIV><P>click on the "network" drop down </P></DIV></DIV></parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true"><DIV><P>you will see the drop down list with the options - IP, Email domain, password, hashed password, device ID</P></DIV></parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="4" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true"><DIV><P>click on email domain and fill "gmail.com" in the field and submit the search</P></DIV></parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true"><P>validate that you get persons results from dehashed with gmail email addresses</P></parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>

testSuite.name: 137841 : Addition of advance search values to Person search

workItem.name: multiparams person search of name and email domain

workItemFields.Microsoft.VSTS.TCM.Steps: <steps id="0" last="2"><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true"><DIV><P>make a person search of the name "david" and the email domain "gmail.com"</P></DIV></parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true"><P>validate that all the results have a gmail email address- in the results search bar write "gmail.com" and verify that all the persons contains this keyword</P></parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>

testSuite.name: 137841 : Addition of advance search values to Person search

workItemFields.Microsoft.VSTS.TCM.Steps: <steps id="0" last="3"><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true"><DIV><P>open the person search popup, click on the "Additional options" in the network drop down list choose  "hashed password" and fill - <A style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);background-color: transparent;white-space: pre;font-family: Roboto, Roboto, &amp;amp;font-size: 14px">afdd0b4ad2ec172c586e2150770fbf9e, and submit the search</A></P></DIV></parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true"><DIV><P>check that you results of persons from dehashed that have the password Aa123456</P></DIV></parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="3" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true"><DIV><P>make another search this time use the hashed password - <SPAN style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);color: rgb(51, 51, 51);font-family: Roboto, Roboto, &amp;quot;font-size: 14px;white-space: normal">5c05d25b14799ac1cfbc8a5f45109855e9fd5dd50ff910144f480371978413cb9da91446e524be1aab3a7bcdcc5a76552945596f7a065fdfb9be4610a062a9e0</SPAN></P></DIV></parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true"><P>validate that you got the same results</P></parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>
